name: Taste test
description:
Open wide and say Aaaah!

Your friend invited you over to taste some foods she cooked. Nothing unusual, you have tasted her cooking before and she's a damn good chef... but this time she wants you to be blind folded... oh well, she must have made some really good dishes if she doesn't even want to let you look at them.

The dishes are real, it's the serving method that's a bit unusual. Yeah, she's putting the food on her dick for you to eat. Come on, I know you wouldn't say no even if you could see it.

This is a request bot, if you want to request a bot head to my patreon

Some of the extra pics are on my discord but all of them are on my patreon

My discord

My patreon
